use_cases: Selecting dates for booking appointments or reservations
Viewing and navigating through months to plan schedules
Displaying week numbers alongside calendar dates for project planning
Integrating with forms for date input in scheduling applications
Time management and calendar coordination across productivity tools
ai_summary: A Shadcn UI calendar component featuring week numbers for enhanced date organization and planning. This accessible date picker provides a clean, responsive calendar interface for selecting dates and viewing week information across desktop and mobile platforms, with support for keyboard navigation and form integration.
